name: cortex
description: Cortex cognitive control-plane service. Phase 0 captures the service boundary and transport contract without taking over LLM execution yet.

tools.name: cortex.describe_boundary
tools.description: Describe Cortex boundaries, ownership, transport, and current implementation scope.

tools.name: cortex.step
tools.description: Execute a reasoning step, optionally as a named worker agent. Primary supervisor use: dispatch a research task to a specialised worker by setting agent_name (e.g. search-agent, analysis-agent, code-agent). The worker runs its own full ReAct loop and returns a result string. Pass the task description as user_input, include user_key so the worker has research context, and call research.task_done with the result after the worker returns. Omit agent_name to run as the default agent.

session_id.description: Stable session identifier for this turn

user_input.description: Raw user message to send to Cortex

agent_name.description: Optional configured agent name. Defaults to the first configured agent.

user_key.description: Optional user key for research context injection. Defaults to session_id when omitted.
